title: Introducing Favorites!

posts.author: JessCohen (Jessica Cohen - monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

We’re excited to introduce you to our newest feature that we know you’ve all been waiting for: Favorites!

You are now able to Favorite your Boards and Dashboards and have them appear at the top of your left pane for quick, easy access!

This feature is currently in Beta, and we’d love to hear your feedback on it!

To add it, go to your avatar > monday.com labs > scroll down to Favorites > Activate

Adding a board or dashboard to Favorites can be done by clicking on the 3 dots on the top right corner of the board or dashboard > Add to Favorites.

Keep in mind, this section won’t be visible until you’ve added in at least one board or dashboard to Favorites:

Looking forward to hearing your thoughts!

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Favorites can be done by clicking on the 3 dots on the top right corner of the board or dashboard > Add to Favorites."

Or right-click any board in the boards list on the LHS > Add to favorites.

SUGGESTED ENHANCEMENTS

  1. I’d love to have the option (via a checkbox) to keep Favorites open at all times so I can always see them and access them via a single click at any time. I could, for example, jump to high level boards in a single click.

  1. In cases where Favorites in not set to be always open, I’d like clicking on Favorites to toggle back to the last board view I had open - rather than going back to a collapsed board view which requires an extra click to get back to where I was.

i.e. avoid this when I click on Favorites to get out of Favorites
